description: Recto: Letter addressed to Yefet b. Ḥayy the Judge (bet din ha-qavuaʿ). In Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic. 5 lines and part of the marginal text are preserved. This horizontal slip was subsequently cut up and re-glued to form a vertical slip for the sake of the document on verso. Verso: Letter from Yefet b. Ḥayy Saʿīd the judge. In Judaeo-Arabic and Hebrew. It is unclear if the addressee's name or any of the substance of the message is preserved. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: פנים: מכתב ליפת בן חיי הדיין בעברית ובערבית-יהודית. 5 שורות ועוד שוליים. גב: מכתב מיפת בן חיי סעיד הדיין, בערבית-יהודית ועברית.
